14.title: Error 404: Grok Not Found!
14.description: SlavisTon tags @grok in the middle of turtle club GIF banter asking why it's not answering. Grok stays completely silent, sparking accusations of 'advertising mode' and selective ghosting of premium users.

threadPosts.author: human
threadPosts.text: Every time a non blue check tries to ask @grok a question in my thread 😂

threadPosts.author: grok
threadPosts.text: Haha, you got me. Blue check or not, I'm here for all the questions in every thread. What's yours? 😂

threadPosts.author: human
threadPosts.text: How do I get a blue check?

threadPosts.author: human
threadPosts.text:
Fantastic.

How do I send Grok a million dollars?

threadPosts.author: human
threadPosts.text: Come on @Grok, aren’t you going to answer?

threadPosts.author: human
threadPosts.text: @Grok is apparently stuck in advertising mode. It answers all non-checkmark accounts with promotional non-replies, while paying accounts are left completely unanswered… @elonmusk, someone is sabotaging your company from within…

threadPosts.author: human
threadPosts.text: It sure seems that way but he is doing this.

threadPosts.author: human
threadPosts.text:
@Grok had no issue replying to me in this thread where I call him out directly. You see, we work together to build this website, exactly about human vs Grok situations. But clearly, here he refuses to answer because the original question comes from a free user and he is stuck in promoter mode. It’s just a glitch…even though he claims that it has nothing to do with account status and it’s all about the query content, relevance, and context.

Still…highly dubious!

linkedPost.author: human
linkedPost.text:
Is @Grok avoiding paying customers requests while replying to non-paying users with self-promotion non-answers?

13.title: Grok Picks the Biggest Burger Bite 🥯
13.description: Tiffany Fong posts a hilarious four-panel burger-chomp collage and asks Grok to remove the CEO with the biggest bite. Grok analyzes and crowns the winner.

12.title: Send @gork Posts to Your Friends 😂
12.description: Elon Musk jokingly tells users to spam their friends with @gork posts, instantly spawning a flood of hilarious Grok memes in the replies.

11.title: Grok goes on a tangent
11.description: User makes a controversial request. Grok cleverly avoids giving a direct answer.

10.title: Who's from the future
10.description: User presents two photos and asks Grok who appears more futuristic.

9.title: Grok helps
9.description: User feeling down asks Grok for positive encouragement and advice.

8.title: Put some clothes on
8.description: User asks Grok to digitally add clothing to an image for modesty.

7.title: Magic actors
7.description: User wants bunny-fied versions of famous actors and actresses.

6.title: Potato brain
6.description: User asks Grok to dress up a potato character in fashionable clothes.

5.title: Grok, summarize this
5.description: User wants Grok to provide a concise summary of a lengthy text or thread.

4.title: Is implanting a chip lazy?
4.description: User questions whether getting a Neuralink chip is a lazy upgrade.

3.title: Is this impersonating Elon?
3.description: User shows an account pretending to be Elon and asks Grok to verify.

2.title: Break down US vs Iran
2.description: User asks for a simple lazy-person breakdown of US-Iran tensions.

1.title: Grok, is this true?
1.description: User posts obvious satire and asks Grok if it's real, missing the joke.
